title: Katta Maisamma temple
tagline: Katta Maisamma temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Katta Maisamma temple is a Hindu temple located at Tank Bund in Hyderabad, Telangana state.
overview.description: Katta Maisamma temple is a Hindu temple located at Tank Bund in Hyderabad, Telangana state. Hindus offer prayers to Goddess Katta Maisamma at the temple during the time of the Bonalu festival. Katta Maisamma popularly known as Amma also located at Turkyamjal. People praise her mainly for the purpose of Happiness, peacefulness and prosperity.

topPlaces.name: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park
topPlaces.description: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park is a deer national park located in Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is spread over 3605 acres.

topPlaces.name: Chowder Pally
topPlaces.description: Chowder Pally is a village in Yacharam mandal of Ranga Reddy district, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Wadaparthy
topPlaces.description: Wadaparthy is a village in the Yadadri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is administered under Bhongir mandal of Bhongir revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Bommalaramaram
topPlaces.description: Bommalaramaram (or B. Ramaram) is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Bommalaramaram mandal of Bhongir division, and is also a part of Hyderabad Metropolitan Region.

topPlaces.name: Mannevaripampu
topPlaces.description: Mannevaripampu is a village in Yadadri Bhongiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

items.note: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park is a deer national park located in Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is spread over 3605 acres.
Chowder Pally is a village in Yacharam mandal of Ranga Reddy district, Telangana, India.
Wadaparthy is a village in the Yadadri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is administered under Bhongir mandal of Bhongir revenue division.

Bommalaramaram (or B. Ramaram) is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Bommalaramaram mandal of Bhongir division, and is also a part of Hyderabad Metropolitan Region.
Mannevaripampu is a village in Yadadri Bhongiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Katta Maisamma temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Katta Maisamma temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Katta Maisamma temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Katta Maisamma temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Katta Maisamma temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Katta Maisamma temple?
faq.a: Stays in Katta Maisamma temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Katta Maisamma temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park, Chowder Pally, Wadaparthy, Bommalaramaram, Mannevaripampu.
